# 新闻速递 2026-04-26

## Coupang
- Coupang创始人面临FTC更严格审查呼声，可能增加监管压力和合规成本。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- Coupang高管与官员用餐被判不违规，减轻公司合规风险和负面影响。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE8wNnVUZ1JfaTRoOHdjWmtwcXYwYlpZZTZMNUt4bzRiRy12YVdLdzB2TTV3SmxqNWhtaV9WN29TaXk4eV9pS2pmSVM4WjNzLUZWOUlsa1llc1dTMHhHczhmbFVsSEc?oc=5)）
- Coupang助力传统海鲜市场数字化转型，拓展本地服务和市场渗透。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitwFBVV95cUxQaXpmUHVSSnBVd1JEeHFSc3VQTVR1RjRsdWZNMlo4Z2hqRlRzcWNrX0V2SG5aNUdHWjEtbzRxYmpsby1KWFUxYm9LM19xRkY2LVlSaFQ2TDVtdTk0VjRDaVhmcURlNmpFR2U5RjI1SmtOMzJWS0tydzMtTmFGV3UwMEhTQnZiakY0NjZxeGwwQmNBUHZQSlA2NkcxQy1GNW9RaUJnVTdqSHp6TjhPUDFCZXVJNXNLWXc?oc=5)）

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre股价近期波动，引发对其投资时机的讨论，影响投资者决策。（[News.google](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxObHJ1QWxfTHRwd1d0LTFONTA2ZjBNYndobTVLdThCMUZOMGFDYzVONDhGSlNqNXJCVWVpSkloajVQZ1NHLXkwbjd5akJnazNKc2o5dkJRdGRSWU95bXRjd3JWOUVYQmxPelpIcGdneHRjQ2lLUmY2OHNKQ0JtcDZJdnFwRkRUX0FtRHZNUHBveVo3VVRoaE9RTWVrYUV2ZGhOcndaLQ?oc=5)）

## Shopee
- Shopee母公司Sea与谷歌合作开发AI应用，有望提升业务创新和竞争力。（[News.google](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
